channel.title: Matrix on Piecewise
channel.description: Recent content in Matrix on Piecewise

item.title: (action) user (user) from room (room) with reason (reason)
item.description: In Matrix → Moderation Jump to block Perform moderation actions on a user in a particular Matrix room. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description action any ✓ The action to perform. user user ✓ The user to take action on. room room ✓ The target room to take action on. reason String The reason for taking the target action.

item.title: (property) of room (room)
item.description: In Matrix → Rooms Jump to block Find a property of a room. Avatar URLs only work on rooms that are not accessed through Pantalaimon. If the item requested does not exist, returns an empty string. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description property any ✓ The property to get. room room ✓ The room to get the property of. Output String

item.title: (property) of sticker (sticker)
item.description: In Matrix → Messages Jump to block Get a property of a Matrix sticker. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description property any ✓ The property to get. sticker sticker ✓ The sticker to get a property of. Output String window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"

item.title: (property) of user (user)
item.description: In Matrix → Users Jump to block Find a property of a user. Avatar URLs only work on rooms that are not accessed through Pantalaimon. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description property any ✓ The property to get. user user ✓ The user to get the property of. Output String window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.

item.title: attachment at location (location)
item.description: In Matrix → Messages Jump to block Attach a file that is available at the specified location. Can be a path to a local file, or a HTTP(S) URL. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description location String ✓ The location of the attachment. Output attachment window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.

item.title: attachment of message (message)
item.description: In Matrix → Messages Jump to block A URL to the attachment in the message, or empty string if there are no attachments. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description message message ✓ The message to fetch the attachment from. Output String window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"

item.title: body of message (message) as (type)
item.description: In Matrix → Messages Jump to block Get the body of a Matrix message. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description message message ✓ The message to get the body of. type any ✓ The type of body to get. Output String window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"

item.title: create (visibility) room with name (name) with topic (topic) with alias (alias) invite (invite)
item.description: In Matrix → Rooms Jump to block Create a new Matrix room. Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: matrix login Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description visibility any ✓ The visibility of the room. name String ✓ The user-friendly name of the room, i.e. “My Cool Room”. topic String The topic of the room, i.

item.title: find room (room)
item.description: In Matrix → Rooms Jump to block Find a Matrix by its ID or alias. You can find a channel’s alias in its settings panel. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description room String ✓ The room to find - either a room ID or a room alias. Output room window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.

item.title: find user by ID (user_id)
item.description: In Matrix → Users Jump to block Find a user by ID. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description user_id String ✓ The ID of the user to find. Output user window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"type":"matrix_user_find","message0":"%1 find user by ID %2","args0":[{"type":"field_image","src":"data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAABYAAAAWCAYAAADEtGw7AAAAAXNSR0IArs4c6QAAAHBJREFUSEtjZGBg+M/AwLCegYEhiIE6YB0DA0MgI9RgEE1N8H/UYFhwDqOgACVBEIBFLsyLIP4lBgYGXaQkhC1F4QwKmMHEJkF0wwkajKwB2RfwSELyGbIjRg2Gh8YwCgpikxkudcMoS4/goKB6ZQoAqEREAb1OW0IAAAAASUVORK5CYII=","width":15,"height":15,"alt":"Matrix","flipRtl":false},{"type":"input_value","name":"user_id","check":"String","required":true,"doc_description":"The ID of the user to find.

item.title: invite user (user) to room (room)
item.description: In Matrix → Users; Matrix → Rooms Jump to block Invite a user to a room. Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: matrix login Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description user user ✓ The user to invite. room room ✓ The room to invite the user to. Output void - This is a statement with no outputs

item.title: join room (room)
item.description: In Matrix → Rooms Jump to block Join a Matrix room Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description room room ✓ The room to join. You can look up a room by its alias by using the ‘find room with ID/alias’ block. Output void - This is a statement with no outputs window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.

item.title: leave room (room)
item.description: In Matrix → Rooms Jump to block Leave a Matrix room. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description room room ✓ The room to leave. Output void - This is a statement with no outputs window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"type":"matrix_room_leave","message0":"%1 leave room %2"

item.title: log in (user_id) and (logon_type) (token) (ignore_me) ignore my own actions (ignore_verification) ignore encryption verification warnings
item.description: In Matrix → Configuration Jump to block Log on to Matrix with the specified homeserver. For more info about tokens, see https://t2bot.io/docs/access_tokens/. For more info about enabling end-to-end encryption for your bot, visit https://doc.piecewise.im/tutorials/matrix_encryption/. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description user_id any ? logon_type any ✓ The authentication method to use. token any ? ignore_me any ✓ Whether to ignore events sent by the bot user in event listeners.

item.title: me
item.description: In Matrix → Users Jump to block Returns the user the bot is running as. Output user window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"type":"matrix_me","message0":"%1 me","args0":[{"type":"field_image","src":"data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAABYAAAAWCAYAAADEtGw7AAAAAXNSR0IArs4c6QAAAHBJREFUSEtjZGBg+M/AwLCegYEhiIE6YB0DA0MgI9RgEE1N8H/UYFhwDqOgACVBEIBFLsyLIP4lBgYGXaQkhC1F4QwKmMHEJkF0wwkajKwB2RfwSELyGbIjRg2Gh8YwCgpikxkudcMoS4/goKB6ZQoAqEREAb1OW0IAAAAASUVORK5CYII=","width":15,"height":15,"alt":"Matrix","flipRtl":false}],"output":["matrix_user"],"colour":165,"tooltip":"Returns the user the bot is running as.","category":"Matrix/Users"}); Blockly.Blocks[block.type] = { init: function () { this.jsonInit(block) } } Blockly.inject(document.querySelector("#blockly"), { readOnly: true }); if( block.blockXml ){ Blockly.Xml.domToWorkspace(Blockly.Xml.textToDom("" + block.blockXml + "

item.title: members of room (room)
item.description: In Matrix → Rooms Jump to block Get the members of a Matrix room. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description room room ✓ The room to get members for. Output Array - The members of the specified Matrix room. window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"

item.title: power level of user (user) in room (room)
item.description: In Matrix → Moderation Jump to block Get the power level of a user in a particular Matrix room. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description user user ✓ The user to get the power level of. room room ✓ The room to get the user’s power level in. Output Number - The user’s power level, or 0.

item.title: redact message (item)
item.description: In Matrix → Messages; Matrix → Moderation Jump to block Redact a Matrix message or sticker. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description item sticker OR message ✓ The item to redact. Output void - This is a statement with no outputs window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"

item.title: send message to room (room) with content (content)
item.description: In Matrix → Messages Jump to block Send a message to a Matrix room. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description room room ✓ The room to send the message to. content String OR attachment OR sticker ✓ The content of the message. Output void - This is a statement with no outputs window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.

item.title: set power level of user (user) in room (room) to (power_level)
item.description: In Matrix → Moderation Jump to block Set the power level of a user in a particular Matrix room. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description user user ✓ The user to set the power level of. room room ✓ The room to set the user’s power level in. power_level Number ✓ The power level to set the user to.

item.title: sticker with image location (url) with description (body)
item.description: In Matrix → Messages Jump to block Create a Matrix sticker. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description url String ✓ The URL or filename of the image to use for the sticker. body String ✓ The description of the sticker. Output sticker window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"

item.title: user (user1) is (user2)
item.description: In Matrix → Users Jump to block Determines whether a user is another, by comparing their IDs. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description user1 user ✓ The user to check. user2 user ✓ The user to check against. Output Boolean window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"

item.title: 🔔 initiator
item.description: In Matrix → Events Jump to block The user who initiated this event. For example, when a user is invited to a room, this is the user who sent the invitation, as opposed to the user that received it; and for message events, this is always the user that sent the message. Output user window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"

item.title: 🔔 message
item.description: In Matrix → Events Jump to block The message that is the target of this event. Output message window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"type":"matrix_event_message","message0":"%1 🔔 message","args0":[{"type":"field_image","src":"data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAABYAAAAWCAYAAADEtGw7AAAAAXNSR0IArs4c6QAAAHBJREFUSEtjZGBg+M/AwLCegYEhiIE6YB0DA0MgI9RgEE1N8H/UYFhwDqOgACVBEIBFLsyLIP4lBgYGXaQkhC1F4QwKmMHEJkF0wwkajKwB2RfwSELyGbIjRg2Gh8YwCgpikxkudcMoS4/goKB6ZQoAqEREAb1OW0IAAAAASUVORK5CYII=","width":15,"height":15,"alt":"Matrix","flipRtl":false}],"output":["matrix_message"],"colour":165,"tooltip":"The message that is the target of this event.","category":"Matrix/Events"}); Blockly.Blocks[block.type] = { init: function () { this.jsonInit(block) } } Blockly.inject(document.querySelector("#blockly"), { readOnly: true }); if( block.blockXml ){ Blockly.Xml.domToWorkspace(Blockly.Xml.textToDom("" + block.

item.title: 🔔 room
item.description: In Matrix → Events Jump to block Message room, i.e. the room that the message was sent to. Only valid within message events, otherwise throws an error. Output room window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"type":"matrix_event_message_room","message0":"%1 🔔 room","args0":[{"type":"field_image","src":"data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAABYAAAAWCAYAAADEtGw7AAAAAXNSR0IArs4c6QAAAHBJREFUSEtjZGBg+M/AwLCegYEhiIE6YB0DA0MgI9RgEE1N8H/UYFhwDqOgACVBEIBFLsyLIP4lBgYGXaQkhC1F4QwKmMHEJkF0wwkajKwB2RfwSELyGbIjRg2Gh8YwCgpikxkudcMoS4/goKB6ZQoAqEREAb1OW0IAAAAASUVORK5CYII=","width":15,"height":15,"alt":"Matrix","flipRtl":false}],"output":["matrix_room"],"colour":165,"tooltip":"Message room, i.e. the room that the message was sent to. Only valid within message events, otherwise throws an error.

item.title: 🔔 sticker
item.description: In Matrix → Events Jump to block The sticker sent as part of this event. Only valid within sticker events, otherwise throws an error. Output sticker window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"type":"matrix_event_sticker","message0":"%1 🔔 sticker","args0":[{"type":"field_image","src":"data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAABYAAAAWCAYAAADEtGw7AAAAAXNSR0IArs4c6QAAAHBJREFUSEtjZGBg+M/AwLCegYEhiIE6YB0DA0MgI9RgEE1N8H/UYFhwDqOgACVBEIBFLsyLIP4lBgYGXaQkhC1F4QwKmMHEJkF0wwkajKwB2RfwSELyGbIjRg2Gh8YwCgpikxkudcMoS4/goKB6ZQoAqEREAb1OW0IAAAAASUVORK5CYII=","width":15,"height":15,"alt":"Matrix","flipRtl":false}],"output":["matrix_sticker"],"colour":165,"tooltip":"The sticker sent as part of this event. Only valid within sticker events, otherwise throws an error.","category":"Matrix/Events"}); Blockly.Blocks[block.type] = { init: function () { this.

item.title: 🔔 user
item.description: In Matrix → Events Jump to block The target of this event. For example, for message events, the user that typed and sent the message; for invitation events, this is the user that was invited. Output user window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"type":"matrix_event_user","message0":"%1 🔔 user","args0":[{"type":"field_image","src":"data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAABYAAAAWCAYAAADEtGw7AAAAAXNSR0IArs4c6QAAAHBJREFUSEtjZGBg+M/AwLCegYEhiIE6YB0DA0MgI9RgEE1N8H/UYFhwDqOgACVBEIBFLsyLIP4lBgYGXaQkhC1F4QwKmMHEJkF0wwkajKwB2RfwSELyGbIjRg2Gh8YwCgpikxkudcMoS4/goKB6ZQoAqEREAb1OW0IAAAAASUVORK5CYII=","width":15,"height":15,"alt":"Matrix","flipRtl":false}],"output":["matrix_user"],"colour":165,"tooltip":"The target of this event. For example, for message events, the user that typed and sent the message; for invitation events, this is the user that was invited.

item.title: 🔔 when (event) do (statement)
item.description: In Matrix → Events Jump to block Run code when an event occurs, such as the bot starting. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description event any ✓ The event to listen to. statement statements… ✓ The statements to execute when the event is triggered. Output void - This is a statement with no outputs window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.
